section.heading: Advertising

content.p: No savings association shall carry on any sale, plan, or practices, or any advertising, in violation of regulations promulgated by a Federal banking agency.

section.sourceCredit: (June 13, 1933, ch. 64, § 12, as added Pub. L. 101–73, title III, § 301, Aug. 9, 1989, 103 Stat. 343; amended Pub. L. 111–203, title III, § 369(10), July 21, 2010, 124 Stat. 1565.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2010—Pub. L. 111–203 substituted “a Federal banking agency” for “the Director”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2010 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 111–203 effective on the transfer date, see section 351 of Pub. L. 111–203, set out as a note under section 906 of Title 2, The Congress.
